description: React task management app with drag-and-drop, focus timer, and today view
notes: The app has been rebranded from Flowki to Hierarch with a new logo (logo.svg used everywhere), domain hierarchical.app, and tagline 'Organization for designers'. The shell UI was overhauled: sidebar and outer frame share #262624 background, main content floats as a rounded card, the task drawer uses Framer Motion for snappy spring animation with a full-height hover-reveal close strip, and task rows now have a colored status dot that opens a status-change dropdown. Today view now uses the same TaskRow component as all other views. Next: auth/persistence wiring or continued UX polish.
